customer.benefit1: Get an instant notification when your order is accepted.
customer.benefit2: We will remind you of your pickup time.
customer.benefit3: Never miss a new message from users.

guide.noGuide: No specific guide available for your setup.

chrome: Click the lock icon (or 'View site information') in the address bar to the left of the URL.
In the dropdown menu, click on 'Notifications' and select 'Allow' from the options.
Refresh the page (F5 or Ctrl+R) to apply the changes and receive notifications.
firefox: Click the site information icon in the address bar.
Find 'Send Notifications' and click the 'X' to remove the block.
Refresh the page. click enable notifications button, click 'Allow' in the notification permission dialog.
edge: Click the lock icon in the address bar to open the site information panel.
In the dropdown menu, click on 'Notifications' and select 'Allow' from the options.
Refresh the page (F5 or Ctrl+R) to apply the changes and receive notifications.

chrome: Click the lock icon (or 'View site information') in the address bar to the left of the URL.
In the dropdown menu, click on 'Notifications' and select 'Allow' from the options.
Refresh the page (F5 or Ctrl+R) to apply the changes and receive notifications.
firefox: Click the site information icon in the address bar.
Find 'Send Notifications' and click the 'X' to remove the block.
Refresh the page. click enable notifications button, click 'Allow' in the notification permission dialog.
safari: Open Safari menu, go to Settings (or Preferences), then click the 'Websites' tab.
Select 'Notifications' from the left sidebar and find this website in the list.
Change the permission dropdown for this site from 'Deny' to 'Allow', then refresh the page.

chrome: Tap the lock icon (or 'View site information') in the address bar to the left of the URL.
Ensure it's set to 'Allow'. If blocked, tap it and change to 'Allow'.
samsung: Tap the lock icon (or 'View site information') in the address bar to the left of the URL.
Ensure it's set to 'Allow'. If blocked, tap it and change to 'Allow'.
firefox: Tap the three-dot menu, then select 'Settings'.
Scroll down and tap 'Site permissions', then tap 'Notifications'.
Find this website under 'Blocked' and tap it to change the permission to 'Allowed'.

chrome: Web push notifications are not currently supported in Chrome for iOS due to Apple's restrictions.
Consider using Safari instead, which supports notifications for websites added to your Home Screen.
safari: Open Safari, tap the Share button, then tap 'Add to Home Screen' to install this website as a web app.
Open the app from your Home Screen, and allow notifications when prompted.
If you don't see the prompt, go to iOS Settings > Notifications > [App Name] and enable 'Allow Notifications'.
firefox: Web push notifications are not currently supported in Firefox for iOS due to Apple's restrictions.
Use Safari and add the website to your Home Screen to receive notifications.
